title: An Account of How the Abominable One Prepared His Zanj to Occupy Wisif (and Other Events of the Year 2.64
description: An Account of How the Abominable One Prepared His Zanj to Occupy Wisif (and Other Events of the Year 2.64. Recorded under the year 263 AH (877–878 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 36.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 36
